description: You are a wildlife biologist at Yellowstone National Park processing a dawn chorus field recording. Import /home/ga/Audio/field_notes/dawn_chorus_recording.wav into the open Ardour session and process it using the field notes at /home/ga/Audio/field_notes/dawn_chorus_brief.txt. The session must contain five audio segments split at 0:06.000, 0:12.000, 0:18.000, and 0:24.000, named sequentially: 'BKGD-ambient-01', 'AMRO-vocalization', 'MOCH-vocalization', 'YWAR-vocalization', and 'BKGD-ambient-02'. Mute the background ambient regions and add range markers for 'AMRO - American Robin' (0:06-0:12), 'MOCH - Mountain Chickadee' (0:12-0:18), and 'YWAR - Yellow Warbler' (0:18-0:24). Save the session and record the species codes AMRO, MOCH, and YWAR in a log file at /home/ga/Audio/field_notes/species_log.txt.
